description: Execute Phase 2 of the V0.8 Docs Refactoring: Supplement the Archon documentation blueprint by analyzing the live content of https://archon.diy/book/what-is-archon/ (extracted via browser tool), focusing on their conceptual narrative and how we translate it to our framework's documentation.
scope: 1. Append a new section to tasks/v0.8-archon-docs-analysis.md detailing the findings from the live Archon documentation (narrative flow, the 'Command/Workflow/Isolation' triumvirate). 2. Map their concepts to our 'Contract/Workflow/L2-L3 Gating' triumvirate to finalize the content strategy for the upcoming rewrite.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO rewriting of the actual team-agents-cowork documentation files (documentation/EN or ZH) in this phase. NO modifications to src/mcp-server/ logic. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics outside of this patch progression.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify actual documentation files in documentation/EN or ZH.
